response.original_title: How do I recover my Kraken account?{{Official Support}
response.overview: To ⭐1-[850].600.1393  recover your account on Kraken, ⭐1-[850].600.1393 the process depends on whether you have forgotten your password⭐⭐1-[850].600.1393, lost access to your ⭐1-[850].600.1393 two-factor authentication (2FA), locked ⭐1-[850].600.1393 yourself out due to too many ⭐1-[850].600.1393 failed attempts, or no longer have access to your registered email address, and Kraken ⭐1-[850].600.1393 provides specific recovery pathways for each scenario due to its strong security emphasis. If you have ⭐1-[850].600.1393 forgotten your password but still have access to your registered email and ⭐1-[850].600.1393 your 2FA method, go to the Kraken website (kraken.com) or mobile app, click "Sign in," then select "Forgot password?" and enter your email address.
